name: Trans-Hub Localizer

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Trans-Hub Localizer 0.1.2

Trans-Hub Localizer is now available as a public release for Obsidian desktop users. It localizes supported community-plugin names, descriptions, settings, commands, and interface text into your selected language, while leaving your vault notes and third-party plugin files unchanged.

语枢 · 插件本地化现已面向 Obsidian 桌面端用户公开发布。它可将已支持的社区插件名称、说明、设置、命令和界面文本本地化为你选择的语言，同时保持库笔记和第三方插件文件不被修改。

### Install / 安装

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`, then place all three files in:

```text
<vault-config-dir>/plugins/trans-hub-plugin-localizer/
```

下载 `main.js`、`manifest.json`、`styles.css`，并将三者放入以上目录；随后在 Obsidian 中启用插件。

### Safety and privacy / 安全与隐私

- Localization is applied at runtime; plugin files and vault notes stay unchanged.
- 本地化在运行时应用；插件文件和库笔记保持不变。
- The client has no advertising or client-side telemetry.
- 客户端不包含广告或客户端遥测。

For the complete usage, privacy, and build details, see the [bilingual README](https://github.com/SakenW/trans-hub-obsidian-localizer/blob/main/README.md).

完整的使用、隐私与构建说明请参阅[双语 README](https://github.com/SakenW/trans-hub-obsidian-localizer/blob/main/README.md)。
releases.name: 0.1.2 — Trans-Hub Localizer 首个公开版本

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Trans-Hub Localizer 0.1.0

Initial public release of Trans-Hub Localizer for Obsidian.

### Highlights

- Localizes supported community plugin names, descriptions, settings, commands, and interface text.
- Applies published translations at runtime without modifying third-party plugin files or vault notes.
- Supports selecting one, multiple, or all enabled community plugins.
- Uses browser-based Trans-Hub account authorization and Obsidian secure storage.

### Release integrity

This release was built from the tagged source and includes SHA-256 checksums and a GitHub artifact attestation. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`, or use the packaged ZIP for manual installation.

**Full changelog:** https://github.com/SakenW/trans-hub-obsidian-localizer/commits/0.1.0
